ab: undokay harem kana wari i kungkuwan, kasaduwan tu i parepakuwa i kungkuwan.
ch: 今天是學校的運動會，學校舉辦了許多競賽。
en: Today was the school's sports day, and the school organized many competitions.

ab: ulra na makedekedeng kana cali, na cemapi’i kana mali, pavekas, malikasaw, di papana’an.
ch: 有拔河、足球、跑步、跳舞和射箭。
en: There were tug of war, soccer, running, dancing, and archery.
I participated in the running competition.

ab: adu pavekas ku mu, kuretapelra’ ku, mudara’ pakirev ku tudu.
ch: 當時我跑步的時候，我跌倒了，膝蓋流了很多血。
en: When I was running, I fell down, and my knees were bleeding.

ab: aymu, marahan ku diya, adi ku madiyadi mungaway pavekas.
ch: 但我還站起來，不停向前跑。
en: But I stood up and continued running forward.

ab: meredek ku lra i raredekan mu, semangal na cau mapiya.
ch: 我到終點時所有人都很開心。
en: Everyone was happy when I reached the finish line.

ab: ara adiya ku muelak kana sanga mu, salaw ku semangal, alra puludus ku lra kana ma’ari’ari.
ch: 雖然沒有獲得第一名，但我很高興，因為我完成了比賽。
en: Although I didn't get first place, I'm glad because I completed the race.
